---
title: "CV"
description: "Curriculum vitae of Vern L. Glaser — education, academic positions, honors, and research grants. Full PDF available for download."
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-banner" style="background-image:url('assets/banner-media.png')">
  <h1>Curriculum Vitae</h1>
  <p class="page-banner__sub">Education, positions, honors, and grants — full PDF available.</p>
</header>
```

```{=html}
<p style="max-width:46rem;">
  <a class="btn-cta" href="assets/Vern_L._Glaser_CV.pdf" download>Download full CV (PDF)</a>
</p>
```

::: {.lead}
The summary below is at-a-glance. The PDF is the complete record — all publications, teaching, conference papers, service, and professional experience.
:::

<hr class="rule">

## Education

<div>

University of Southern California — PhD, Management and Organization (2014)

Duke University — MBA, Business Administration (2000)

University of California, Los Angeles — BA, Economics (1992)

</div>

<hr class="rule">

## Academic Positions

<div>

Professor of Entrepreneurship and Family Enterprise, Alberta School of Business, University of Alberta (2024 – present)

Academic Director, Alberta Business Family Institute, University of Alberta (2021 – present)

Academic Director, Centre for Entrepreneurship and Family Enterprise, University of Alberta (2021 – present)

Associate Professor, Alberta School of Business, University of Alberta (2020 – 2024)

Assistant Professor, Alberta School of Business, University of Alberta (2014 – 2019)

</div>

::: {.band--wash}

## Selected Honors & Awards

```{=html}
<p><span class="chip-prize">2021 James G. March Prize</span></p>
```

Awarded bi-annually for the best article in *Organization Theory* (EGOS / SAGE), for *The Biography of an Algorithm*.

<hr class="coral-rule">

Eric Geddes Professor of Business Faculty Fellowship, *Beyond Project Management: Understanding the Relational Work of Family Business Consulting* (2025 – 2027)

Donald and Margaret MacKenzie Teaching Award (2025)

MBA Association Excellence in Teaching Award (2025)

Finalist, 2023 OMT Best Paper Published Award, *Algorithmic Routines and Dynamic Inertia* (2024)

Eric Geddes Professor of Business Faculty Fellowship, *The Biography of an Algorithm* (2021 – 2024)

MBA Association Excellence in Teaching Award (2018)

:::

<hr class="rule">

## Research Grants

<div>

SSHRC Insight Grant — *Decoding the Black Box: Tracing the Inscription of Values in Large Language Models* (with Tina Dacin) (2024 – 2026)

SSHRC Insight Grant — *The Hidden Practices of Data Analytics* (with Christopher W.J. Steele) (2020 – 2023)

SSHRC Insight Development Grant — *Big Data and the Rise of the Data Scientist* (with Christopher Steele and Joel Gehman) (2016 – 2018)

</div>

<hr class="rule">

```{=html}
<p style="max-width:46rem;">
  <a class="btn-cta" href="assets/Vern_L._Glaser_CV.pdf" download>Download full CV (PDF)</a>
</p>
```
